caption: A man with a dark complexion is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone. He is wearing a green baseball cap, black over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt that features the white printed text "ION NEVER DO SHIT". The background is a room decorated with numerous framed photographs and artwork on the walls, and a white mannequin wearing a white top is visible behind him. To the right, a rack of clothing is partially visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red text logo on the right that reads "BOSSY FLEX TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, continuing to speak with an animated expression, his mouth opening and closing as he talks, and his head shifting slightly.
